What entities are present and what are they doing during the frying process?
canonical_answer: Three circular battered food items are submerged in bubbling golden cooking oil on a metal gas stove burner. Wooden chopsticks lift one golden-brown breaded ring above the oil surface while others fry. Finished fried onion rings rest on a white rectangular serving plate alongside bright red and pale yellow sauces.

question: Describe the frying and plating steps as they occur in the first half.
canonical_answer: At 2s, three battered rings fry in bubbling oil over a blue flame; at 4s, wooden chopsticks lift one golden-brown ring above the hot pan; at 6s, human hands place seven crispy rings onto a white rectangular serving plate.

question: Describe the presenter and final dish presentation as shown in the second half.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a woman wearing a yellow top stands near a white door; at 14s, bright red and pale yellow sauces sit beside golden-brown rings; at 15s, stylized text reading ONION RINGS appears on screen.
